functions.title: Guide Book #85

pages:
§7Guide Book #85§r
§lNethermite§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Small arthropod, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All nether biomes.
•§lHealth§r: 14
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25

•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Solid Blocks.
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Arthropod Meat, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Active Heated Netherrack
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 1-2
•Can climb blocks.
•Can randomly sit.
•Can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
